summary: Tested 'Valorización de Inventario' feature. All 10 backend tests passed. All UI features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reports/inventory-valuation returns correct response structure
Backend: dead_stock has correct structure (total_value, count, items)

Backend: valuation items have all required fields (ingredient_id, name, category, unit, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, current_stock, unit_cost, stock_value, recent_movement, is_dead_stock, min_stock, is_low_stock)
Backend: Filter by category (licores) returns only licores items
Backend: Filter by warehouse_id returns only items from that warehouse
Backend: Combined filters (warehouse + category) work correctly
Backend: by_category breakdown has correct structure (value, items, stock_units)
Backend: by_warehouse breakdown has correct structure (name, value, items)
Backend: Stock value calculation verification (stock_value = current_stock * unit_cost)
Backend: Total value matches sum of all items
Frontend: Valorización tab visible in InventoryManager tabs with emerald green styling
Frontend: Header shows 'Valorización de Inventario' with emerald gradient style
Frontend: Total Value card shows RD$ 8,431.50 with registros/ingredientes count
Frontend: Filtros section has Almacén and Categoría dropdowns
Frontend: 'Aplicar Filtros' button works correctly
Frontend: 'Desglose por Categoría' shows breakdown with percentages and progress bars
Frontend: 'Desglose por Almacén' shows breakdown with percentages and progress bars
Frontend: 'Stock Muerto Detectado' panel shows dead stock warning in red
Frontend: Dead stock items shown with value (Ron Brugal, Pollo Entero)
Frontend: Table columns: Insumo, Categoría, Almacén, Stock, Costo Unit., Valor Stock, Mov. 30d
Frontend: 'Stock Muerto' badge in red for dead stock items
Frontend: 'Stock Bajo' badge in amber for low stock items
Frontend: Filter by category (Licores) updates all values correctly
Frontend: Filter by warehouse (Almacen Principal) updates all values correctly
Frontend: 'Exportar a Excel' button visible and enabled
Frontend: 'Actualizar' button visible and functional
seed_data_creation: Used existing stock data from database. Items tested: Ron Brugal (licores), Pollo Entero (carnes), Limón Verde (frutas), Salsa Criolla (condimentos)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory Valuation feature fully working. Key endpoint: GET /api/reports/inventory-valuation with filters: warehouse_id, category. Returns {total_value, total_items, total_ingredients, by_category, by_warehouse, dead_stock, items}. Dead stock detection works for items with >1000 value and <10% movement in 30 days. Frontend valuation tab accessible via Config > Inventario > Stock > Abrir Inventario > Valorización tab. Export button uses xlsx library to generate Excel file with 3 sheets (Valorización, Resumen, Por Categoría).

features: Header with emerald gradient shows title
Total Value card shows RD$ amount prominently
Actualizar and Exportar buttons in header
Category breakdown with values and percentages
Warehouse breakdown with values and percentages
Dead stock warning panel in red

dead_stock_detection.criteria: Value > RD$ 1000 AND movement < 10% of stock in 30 days

details: Green progress bars for category breakdown
Blue progress bars for warehouse breakdown
Red styling for dead stock warning

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
